description: A Phoenix LiveView Input OTP component.
docs:
Add to the `html_helpers` function in your `my_app_web.ex`:

    import MyAppWeb.Components.UI.InputOTP

Replace `MyAppWeb` with your application's module prefix.

This component requires the `InputOtp` JS hook. Copy it from the `Hooks.InputOtp` block in:
https://github.com/joIibois/elixircn/blob/master/assets/js/app.js

files.content:
defmodule MyAppWeb.Components.UI.InputOtp do use Phoenix.Component attr :id, :string, required: true attr :name, :string, default: nil attr :length, :integer, default: 6 attr :value, :string, default: "" attr :disabled, :boolean, default: false attr :class, :string, default: nil attr :rest, :global, include: ~w(phx-change) def input_otp(assigns) do digits = assigns.value |> String.graphemes() |> then(fn g -> g ++ List.duplicate("", max(0, assigns.length - length(g))) end) |> Enum.take(assigns.length) assigns = assign(assigns, :digits, digits) ~H"""
""" end end

name: input-otp
title: Input OTP
